text:
the votes are in and we’re excited to announce our new nonstop route from jfk is sardinia…..AND malta! while skymiles members loved sardinia, our employee voters loved malta, so we said, “why not both?”

and since good things come in threes, we’re also launching limited-time deals to book your summer 2026 travel to both destinations. head over to the delta app to check them out and let us know which island you’re going to first ✈️ #deltaairlines #sardinia #malta
